assumption_text: The episode is restricted to the 16-17 October 2002 direct-violence window in Comuna 13.
rationale: Truth Commission material makes clear that later coercion and disappearances continued in subsequent months; those later harms are not mixed into this direct-death window.

assumption_text: The '10 entre civiles y milicianos' official figure is retained as mixed/unknown status and is not split proportionally.
rationale: Project rules prohibit silently reallocating mixed-status deaths into civilian or military totals.

assumption_text: No whole-comuna or whole-city civilian denominator is used.
rationale: The directly exposed civilian population under fire inside the operation theater remains unresolved, so using Comuna 13's full population would violate the denominator rules.
